blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,757 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
